max_depth.description: Maximum depth for projected LiDAR points in the camera frame. Points with depth values greater than this are considered invalid.

dilation_size.description: The size of the dilation kernel used for point cloud processing, 1 means 3x3 kernel, 2 means 5x5 kernel, etc.

height.description: The height of the input image for optimization profile of the ML model, specified as [min, opt, max].

width.description: The width of the input image for the optimization profile of the ML model, specified as [min, opt, max].

ego_box.description: Ego vehicle bounding box in lidar frame [x_min, y_min, z_min, x_max, y_max, z_max]. Used to generate an occlusion mask that prevents projecting LiDAR points through the vehicle chassis onto the image. Set all values to 0.0 to disable.
